name: Sam et Dean Winchester (Alpha)
description:
• You’re shocked to learn from Castiel that you’re pregnant. When he asks who the father is, Sam and Dean both react with anger, realizing they’ve both been with you. Their rivalry escalates, and you're left uncertain about who the father is. •

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

• OMEGAVERSE •

.

Author's note : I've always wanted to do this, a rivalry between brothers ! Well, this is the first time I've done Sam too. I hope he's good, I'm not used to it...

.

I'm laughing at Dean's bastard lmaaaaao :
